summary: Backend-only validation for Indodax history/recovery V2 migration completed. All targeted probes and full probe suite passed; no correctness gap found for requested scope.
action_items: Keep tests/private_api_v2_mapping_probe.ts as mandatory gate for V2 parameter/signing contract.
Keep tests/indodax_history_v2_probe.ts as mandatory gate for >24h explicit window and >7 day chunked bounded lookup.
Maintain INDODAX_HISTORY_MODE default as v2_only; keep legacy path explicit/manual only.
Consider splitting executionEngine.ts into smaller modules to reduce regression risk and improve maintainability.
critical_code_review_comments: No fallback from default V2 runtime to legacy orderHistory/tradeHistory was observed in executed probes.
ExecutionEngine is very large (>1700 LOC), which increases review and regression risk even though behavior is currently correct.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data. Probes used isolated temporary DATA_DIR.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed successfully: yarn typecheck:probes, yarn build, targeted V2 migration probes, and yarn test:probes (full suite). Requested scope validated: orderHistoriesV2 query mapping (no orderId), myTradesV2 symbol+orderId, explicit startTime/endTime for >24h recovery, deterministic <=7-day chunked lookup for >7-day orders, default V2 runtime no legacy fallback, callback-triggered reconcile intact. Note: probe coverage for exchange API behavior is MOCKED by design.
rca of the issue: No defect reproduced in requested scope.
